query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "active learners as efficient prp rerankers" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for neural-based learning-to-rank and sorting algorithms, which is the core mechanism underlying the "Active Learners as Efficient PRP Rerankers" approach mentioned in the user's question. Additionally, it addresses criterion (b) by measuring the performance of neural ranking models on standard datasets, providing an empirical baseline for the dependent variable (ranking quality) in the same domain.
